name: Raised Striped Chunky Knit Throw Blanket Green - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Midweight, Tasseled, Machine Washable
description:
Bring cozy warmth to any room of your house with this Raised Striped Chunky Knit Throw Blanket from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This throw blanket showcases a raised striped chunky knit pattern for a stylish look and comfy feel, along with decorative tassels for added appeal. Perfectly placed on your bed, sofa or other seating, this throw blanket is machine washable for easy upkeep.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
